moments.title: Summer Solstice
moments.blurb: Today marks the summer solstice, the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere

angles.name: Sun's out
angles.copy: The summer solstice is here, and with it the longest day of the year

angles.name: Sunset fun
angles.copy: Make the most of the extra daylight hours and enjoy the outdoors this evening

angles.name: Seasonal vibes
angles.copy: The summer solstice marks the beginning of summer, a time for adventure and making memories

moments.title: Wimbledon Approaches
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships begin on June 29 and will run for two weeks

angles.name: Tennis fever
angles.copy: Get ready for two weeks of world-class tennis as Wimbledon begins on June 29

angles.name: Grass court action
angles.copy: The grass courts of SW19 will host the biggest names in tennis from June 29

angles.name: British hopes
angles.copy: Will this be the year a British player lifts the Wimbledon trophy?

moments.title: British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix takes place at Silverstone on July 5, round 12 of the 2026 F1 season

angles.name: F1 at Silverstone
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is just around the corner, with the race taking place on July 5

angles.name: Racing action
angles.copy: Get ready for high-speed action as the F1 season arrives at Silverstone

angles.name: Home advantage
angles.copy: Can the British drivers make the most of their home advantage at the British Grand Prix?
